team_name: Nyaya-Setu — AI-Driven Legal Action & Compliance Engine
summary: Develop an AI system to extract key information from court judgment PDFs and generate verified action plans for government use.
optimization_claims: Eliminates the risk of missing critical directives hidden on page 45 of a judgment PDF
Fundamentally shifts the government’s legal strategy from reactive to proactive
Guarantees high-stakes legal decisions are backed by evidence
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
